caption: A man wearing a red traditional cap and a patterned garment is shown in a series of close-up shots. He is speaking, with his facial expressions and mouth movements changing slightly as the video progresses. He is positioned in front of a neutral, light-colored wall. The "plustv" logo appears in the upper left of each shot. On-screen text identifies the man as "FRANCIS CHILAKA POLITICAL ANALYST" and displays the headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU" alongside a "PLUS POLITICS" label. Banners at the bottom of the screen include "FOLLOW US" with social media icons, the handle "PLUSTVAFRICA," and "SUBSCRIBE" next to the web address "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA." Further channel information for "DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308" is visible. The camera angle remains a steady close-up on the man throughout the sequence.
